features.name: Insights
features.desc: Insights is a feature that allows users to analyze market trends in various aspects and dive deep into many industry sectors.

features.name: Find Gems
features.desc: Find Gems is a feature that helps users identify potential Tokens at the current time.

features.name: Launch Explorer
features.desc: Launch Explorer is a feature that enables users to access real-time data of tokens on popular launchpads like pump.fun, letsbonk.fun,...

services.name: Expansive data
services.desc: Birdeye provides expansive data covering tokens, wallets, trades, and protocols across 300+ exchanges on 10 chains.

services.name: Flexible pricing
services.desc: Whether you’re a solo tinkerer or a large team looking to scale, Birdeye offers plans that caters for your data needs and budget.

services.name: API docs
services.desc: Dive into our docs and start querying data on 60+ APIs and 8 WebSocket types today!

events.name: Solana launched program to enhance network security
events.desc: After the Drift Protocol's hack, Solana Foundation initiated programs such as STRIDE and SIRIN to tighten security for ecosystem teams
